{"id":"cf-r9sc","title":"Swatch & comfort experience — fabric visualizer, swatch request flow, comfort story cards","description":"## Swatch & Comfort Experience

Solves the #1 online furniture objection: 'I can't touch it.' This is our highest-trust conversion driver per competitive analysis. Albany Park and Joybird prove free swatches lift conversion significantly.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Fabric swatch grid: color-family filtering (Neutrals, Blues, Greens, Reds, Patterns), thumbnail grid with fabric name
- [ ] Swatch detail modal: large fabric image, material composition, care instructions, texture description
- [ ] Swatch request flow: select up to 6 swatches, enter shipping address, confirmation with estimated arrival
- [ ] Swatch request CTA prominently on product page: 'Can't decide? Get free swatches' with Mountain Blue styling
- [ ] Comfort story cards: illustrated descriptions — hand-drawn figure for Plush (sinking into cushion), Firm (sitting upright), Medium (balanced). Replace clinical 1-5 scales with personality.
- [ ] Comfort filtering on category pages: filter by comfort level with illustrated icons
- [ ] Product page 'Feel & Comfort' section: comfort card + fabric detail + swatch request CTA grouped together
- [ ] Swatch confirmation email: branded template with mountain illustration, 'Your swatches are on the way'
- [ ] Mobile: swatch grid scrollable, request flow works on small screens
- [ ] WCAG AA: all swatch selectors labeled, comfort cards have alt text
- [ ] Tests: swatch selection/deselection, max 6 limit, request form validation, comfort card rendering, filter integration","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:37:59Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T01:37:59Z"}

{"id":"cf-5qpo","title":"Conversion optimization — exit-intent, urgency signals, social proof, email capture","description":"## Conversion Optimization Layer

The features that turn browsers into buyers. These are the difference between a portfolio site and a sales machine.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Exit-intent popup: triggers on mouse-leave (desktop) / back-button (mobile), offers 10% welcome coupon, email capture, Mountain Blue/Coral design, fires only once per session
- [ ] Stock urgency badges: 'Only X left' on product cards + product page, pulse animation on low stock
- [ ] Social proof notifications: 'Sarah from Asheville just purchased...' toast, subtle, dismissible, shows real data from recent orders
- [ ] Free shipping progress bar: persistent in header/cart showing distance to $999 threshold
- [ ] Bundle upsell prompts: 'Add a mattress and save 5%' on product page + cart
- [ ] Sticky add-to-cart CTA on product page (appears on scroll past main button)
- [ ] 'Back in Stock' notification signup for out-of-stock items
- [ ] Newsletter signup: footer + dedicated modal, Mountain-themed design, 10% welcome offer
- [ ] Recently viewed bar: bottom of page, persists across navigation
- [ ] Trust badges at checkout: SSL, money-back guarantee, secure payment icons
- [ ] Mobile: exit-intent adapted for back-button, popups sized for touch, no layout shift
- [ ] Tests: popup trigger/dismiss, email validation, urgency badge thresholds, shipping progress calculation, mobile interactions","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:37:49Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T01:37:49Z"}

{"id":"cf-dvlj","title":"Customer reviews and ratings system — product reviews with photo upload, star ratings, verified purchase badges","description":"## Customer Reviews & Ratings System

**Why:** Social proof is the #1 conversion funnel gap (per STRATEGY.md). No product reviews = no trust signals at decision point.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Star rating display on Product Page (1-5 stars, half-star increments)
- [ ] Review submission form with text, star rating, and photo upload (max 3 photos)
- [ ] Verified purchase badge on reviews from customers with matching order history
- [ ] Review moderation queue (backend) — new reviews are pending until approved
- [ ] Average rating + review count shown on category page product cards
- [ ] Sort reviews by: newest, highest rated, lowest rated, most helpful
- [ ] 'Was this helpful?' voting on each review
- [ ] Empty state: 'Be the first to review this product' CTA
- [ ] Error handling: upload failures, network drops, invalid input
- [ ] Mobile responsive, keyboard accessible
- [ ] Sanitize all user input (text + image metadata)
- [ ] Tests: happy path, error states, empty states, XSS vectors, image upload failures","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:03Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:03Z"}

{"id":"cf-g23j","title":"Recently viewed products with personalized recommendations — sessionStorage carousel and cross-sell","description":"## Recently Viewed + Personalized Recommendations

**Why:** 'Recently viewed' persistence is a known funnel gap — resets on page reload. Cross-sell engine exists but needs a 'Customers Also Bought' companion.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] sessionStorage-based 'Recently Viewed' tracking (persist across page navigations within session)
- [ ] 'You Recently Viewed' carousel on Product Page (below main content) and Home page
- [ ] Max 12 items, FIFO eviction, no duplicates
- [ ] 'Customers Also Bought' section using existing productRecommendations backend
- [ ] Carousel: responsive, swipeable on mobile, keyboard navigable
- [ ] Quick-view or quick-add-to-cart from carousel items
- [ ] Empty state handling: new visitor with no history
- [ ] Error handling: corrupted sessionStorage, recommendation API failures
- [ ] Privacy: no PII in sessionStorage, clear on logout
- [ ] Tests: storage persistence, eviction logic, API failures, empty states, mobile swipe
- [ ] Accessibility: aria-labels on carousel, focus management","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:10Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:10Z"}

{"id":"cf-c66a","title":"Product size and dimension guide with room fit visualization — interactive calculator and overlays","description":"## Product Size & Dimension Guide with Room Fit Visualization

**Why:** Persona C (Small Space Dweller) is dimension-obsessed. 'Will it fit through my door?' is a top objection. Interactive dimension tools reduce returns and increase confidence.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Dimension overlay on product gallery images (length x width x height callouts)
- [ ] 'Will It Fit?' calculator: user inputs room dimensions, shows product-to-room scale
- [ ] Doorway clearance check: product dimensions vs standard door sizes (30/32/36 inch)
- [ ] Assembly dimensions vs box dimensions (shipped folded vs assembled)
- [ ] Visual comparison: product shown next to common reference objects (6ft person, standard couch)
- [ ] Responsive: works on mobile with touch interactions
- [ ] Data source: pull dimensions from product CMS fields
- [ ] Fallback: if dimensions missing, show 'Dimensions coming soon' with contact CTA
- [ ] Error handling: invalid user inputs (negative numbers, non-numeric), missing product data
- [ ] Tests: calculator math, boundary values, missing data, mobile interactions
- [ ] Accessibility: screen reader announces dimension values, keyboard operable","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:18Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:18Z"}

{"id":"cf-kadj","title":"Live chat widget — Tidio or Wix Chat integration with proactive triggers and accessibility","description":"## Live Chat Widget Integration

**Why:** Questions kill momentum at checkout. Live chat is a medium-impact funnel gap per STRATEGY.md. Proactive triggers can catch abandoning users.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Integrate Tidio or Wix Chat widget (evaluate both, recommend one)
- [ ] Chat bubble visible on all pages, non-intrusive positioning (bottom-right)
- [ ] Proactive triggers: auto-open after 30s on Product Page, after 10s on Checkout if idle
- [ ] Pre-chat form: name, email, question category (Sales/Support/Returns)
- [ ] Business hours indicator: 'We typically reply within X' or 'Live now' badge
- [ ] Mobile responsive: full-screen chat on mobile, dismissible
- [ ] Keyboard accessible: focus trap when open, Escape to close
- [ ] Integration: pass current page URL and product name to agent context
- [ ] Offline mode: email form when no agents available
- [ ] Analytics: track chat opens, messages sent, conversion correlation
- [ ] Tests: widget load, trigger timing, offline fallback, mobile layout, keyboard nav
- [ ] No performance impact: lazy-load widget after page interactive","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:26Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:26Z"}

{"id":"cf-5qpo","title":"Conversion optimization — exit-intent, urgency signals, social proof, email capture","description":"## Conversion Optimization Layer

The features that turn browsers into buyers. These are the difference between a portfolio site and a sales machine.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Exit-intent popup: triggers on mouse-leave (desktop) / back-button (mobile), offers 10% welcome coupon, email capture, Mountain Blue/Coral design, fires only once per session
- [ ] Stock urgency badges: 'Only X left' on product cards + product page, pulse animation on low stock
- [ ] Social proof notifications: 'Sarah from Asheville just purchased...' toast, subtle, dismissible, shows real data from recent orders
- [ ] Free shipping progress bar: persistent in header/cart showing distance to $999 threshold
- [ ] Bundle upsell prompts: 'Add a mattress and save 5%' on product page + cart
- [ ] Sticky add-to-cart CTA on product page (appears on scroll past main button)
- [ ] 'Back in Stock' notification signup for out-of-stock items
- [ ] Newsletter signup: footer + dedicated modal, Mountain-themed design, 10% welcome offer
- [ ] Recently viewed bar: bottom of page, persists across navigation
- [ ] Trust badges at checkout: SSL, money-back guarantee, secure payment icons
- [ ] Mobile: exit-intent adapted for back-button, popups sized for touch, no layout shift
- [ ] Tests: popup trigger/dismiss, email validation, urgency badge thresholds, shipping progress calculation, mobile interactions","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cfutons/crew/rennala","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:37:49Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T01:38:54Z"}

{"id":"cf-kadj","title":"Live chat widget — Tidio or Wix Chat integration with proactive triggers and accessibility","description":"## Live Chat Widget Integration

**Why:** Questions kill momentum at checkout. Live chat is a medium-impact funnel gap per STRATEGY.md. Proactive triggers can catch abandoning users.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Integrate Tidio or Wix Chat widget (evaluate both, recommend one)
- [ ] Chat bubble visible on all pages, non-intrusive positioning (bottom-right)
- [ ] Proactive triggers: auto-open after 30s on Product Page, after 10s on Checkout if idle
- [ ] Pre-chat form: name, email, question category (Sales/Support/Returns)
- [ ] Business hours indicator: 'We typically reply within X' or 'Live now' badge
- [ ] Mobile responsive: full-screen chat on mobile, dismissible
- [ ] Keyboard accessible: focus trap when open, Escape to close
- [ ] Integration: pass current page URL and product name to agent context
- [ ] Offline mode: email form when no agents available
- [ ] Analytics: track chat opens, messages sent, conversion correlation
- [ ] Tests: widget load, trigger timing, offline fallback, mobile layout, keyboard nav
- [ ] No performance impact: lazy-load widget after page interactive","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"cfutons/crew/godfrey","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:26Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:38Z"}

{"id":"cf-r9sc","title":"Swatch & comfort experience — fabric visualizer, swatch request flow, comfort story cards","description":"## Swatch & Comfort Experience

Solves the #1 online furniture objection: 'I can't touch it.' This is our highest-trust conversion driver per competitive analysis. Albany Park and Joybird prove free swatches lift conversion significantly.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Fabric swatch grid: color-family filtering (Neutrals, Blues, Greens, Reds, Patterns), thumbnail grid with fabric name
- [ ] Swatch detail modal: large fabric image, material composition, care instructions, texture description
- [ ] Swatch request flow: select up to 6 swatches, enter shipping address, confirmation with estimated arrival
- [ ] Swatch request CTA prominently on product page: 'Can't decide? Get free swatches' with Mountain Blue styling
- [ ] Comfort story cards: illustrated descriptions — hand-drawn figure for Plush (sinking into cushion), Firm (sitting upright), Medium (balanced). Replace clinical 1-5 scales with personality.
- [ ] Comfort filtering on category pages: filter by comfort level with illustrated icons
- [ ] Product page 'Feel & Comfort' section: comfort card + fabric detail + swatch request CTA grouped together
- [ ] Swatch confirmation email: branded template with mountain illustration, 'Your swatches are on the way'
- [ ] Mobile: swatch grid scrollable, request flow works on small screens
- [ ] WCAG AA: all swatch selectors labeled, comfort cards have alt text
- [ ] Tests: swatch selection/deselection, max 6 limit, request form validation, comfort card rendering, filter integration","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cfutons/crew/radahn","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:37:59Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T01:38:53Z"}

{"id":"cf-c66a","title":"Product size and dimension guide with room fit visualization — interactive calculator and overlays","description":"## Product Size & Dimension Guide with Room Fit Visualization

**Why:** Persona C (Small Space Dweller) is dimension-obsessed. 'Will it fit through my door?' is a top objection. Interactive dimension tools reduce returns and increase confidence.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Dimension overlay on product gallery images (length x width x height callouts)
- [ ] 'Will It Fit?' calculator: user inputs room dimensions, shows product-to-room scale
- [ ] Doorway clearance check: product dimensions vs standard door sizes (30/32/36 inch)
- [ ] Assembly dimensions vs box dimensions (shipped folded vs assembled)
- [ ] Visual comparison: product shown next to common reference objects (6ft person, standard couch)
- [ ] Responsive: works on mobile with touch interactions
- [ ] Data source: pull dimensions from product CMS fields
- [ ] Fallback: if dimensions missing, show 'Dimensions coming soon' with contact CTA
- [ ] Error handling: invalid user inputs (negative numbers, non-numeric), missing product data
- [ ] Tests: calculator math, boundary values, missing data, mobile interactions
- [ ] Accessibility: screen reader announces dimension values, keyboard operable","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"cfutons/crew/miquella","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:18Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:38Z"}

{"id":"cf-dvlj","title":"Customer reviews and ratings system — product reviews with photo upload, star ratings, verified purchase badges","description":"## Customer Reviews & Ratings System

**Why:** Social proof is the #1 conversion funnel gap (per STRATEGY.md). No product reviews = no trust signals at decision point.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Star rating display on Product Page (1-5 stars, half-star increments)
- [ ] Review submission form with text, star rating, and photo upload (max 3 photos)
- [ ] Verified purchase badge on reviews from customers with matching order history
- [ ] Review moderation queue (backend) — new reviews are pending until approved
- [ ] Average rating + review count shown on category page product cards
- [ ] Sort reviews by: newest, highest rated, lowest rated, most helpful
- [ ] 'Was this helpful?' voting on each review
- [ ] Empty state: 'Be the first to review this product' CTA
- [ ] Error handling: upload failures, network drops, invalid input
- [ ] Mobile responsive, keyboard accessible
- [ ] Sanitize all user input (text + image metadata)
- [ ] Tests: happy path, error states, empty states, XSS vectors, image upload failures","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"cfutons/crew/rennala","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:03Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:30Z"}

{"id":"cf-g23j","title":"Recently viewed products with personalized recommendations — sessionStorage carousel and cross-sell","description":"## Recently Viewed + Personalized Recommendations

**Why:** 'Recently viewed' persistence is a known funnel gap — resets on page reload. Cross-sell engine exists but needs a 'Customers Also Bought' companion.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] sessionStorage-based 'Recently Viewed' tracking (persist across page navigations within session)
- [ ] 'You Recently Viewed' carousel on Product Page (below main content) and Home page
- [ ] Max 12 items, FIFO eviction, no duplicates
- [ ] 'Customers Also Bought' section using existing productRecommendations backend
- [ ] Carousel: responsive, swipeable on mobile, keyboard navigable
- [ ] Quick-view or quick-add-to-cart from carousel items
- [ ] Empty state handling: new visitor with no history
- [ ] Error handling: corrupted sessionStorage, recommendation API failures
- [ ] Privacy: no PII in sessionStorage, clear on logout
- [ ] Tests: storage persistence, eviction logic, API failures, empty states, mobile swipe
- [ ] Accessibility: aria-labels on carousel, focus management","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"cfutons/crew/radahn","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:10Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:37Z"}

{"id":"cf-0sej","title":"Navigation, global layout & footer — responsive nav, mobile hamburger, breadcrumbs, footer links","description":"## Navigation, Global Layout & Footer

The frame that holds everything together. Must feel cohesive and premium.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Desktop nav: logo left, category links center, search/cart/account right, sticky on scroll
- [ ] Mobile nav: hamburger menu with slide-out drawer, category accordion, search bar at top
- [ ] Mega menu for categories: organized by type with featured product image
- [ ] Search: autocomplete with product thumbnails, category suggestions, 'No results' handling
- [ ] Breadcrumbs: schema-compliant, styled with Espresso text, clickable hierarchy
- [ ] Footer: 4-column layout (Shop, About, Support, Connect), newsletter signup, social icons, payment badges
- [ ] Announcement bar: top strip for sales/shipping promos, dismissible, rotates messages
- [ ] Back-to-top button: appears on scroll, smooth scroll, mountain arrow icon
- [ ] Active page indicator in nav
- [ ] All design tokens: nav background Sand, active links Mountain Blue, hover Coral
- [ ] Mobile: footer collapses to accordions, nav transitions smooth (300ms)
- [ ] WCAG AA: skip-to-content link, keyboard nav through all menus, aria-expanded on dropdowns
- [ ] Tests: nav open/close, search suggestions, mobile drawer, breadcrumb rendering, footer links","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:35:53Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T02:10:22Z"}

{"id":"cf-5qpo","title":"Conversion optimization — exit-intent, urgency signals, social proof, email capture","description":"## Conversion Optimization Layer

The features that turn browsers into buyers. These are the difference between a portfolio site and a sales machine.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Exit-intent popup: triggers on mouse-leave (desktop) / back-button (mobile), offers 10% welcome coupon, email capture, Mountain Blue/Coral design, fires only once per session
- [ ] Stock urgency badges: 'Only X left' on product cards + product page, pulse animation on low stock
- [ ] Social proof notifications: 'Sarah from Asheville just purchased...' toast, subtle, dismissible, shows real data from recent orders
- [ ] Free shipping progress bar: persistent in header/cart showing distance to $999 threshold
- [ ] Bundle upsell prompts: 'Add a mattress and save 5%' on product page + cart
- [ ] Sticky add-to-cart CTA on product page (appears on scroll past main button)
- [ ] 'Back in Stock' notification signup for out-of-stock items
- [ ] Newsletter signup: footer + dedicated modal, Mountain-themed design, 10% welcome offer
- [ ] Recently viewed bar: bottom of page, persists across navigation
- [ ] Trust badges at checkout: SSL, money-back guarantee, secure payment icons
- [ ] Mobile: exit-intent adapted for back-button, popups sized for touch, no layout shift
- [ ] Tests: popup trigger/dismiss, email validation, urgency badge thresholds, shipping progress calculation, mobile interactions","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:37:49Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T02:10:29Z"}

{"id":"cf-6arz","title":"Cart & checkout flow polish — side cart UX, checkout page, payment UI, success states","description":"## Cart & Checkout Flow Polish

Seamless purchase experience from add-to-cart through confirmation.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Side cart: slides in from right on add-to-cart, shows items with images, quantity spinners, subtotal
- [ ] Cart page: full layout with product images, quantity controls, remove buttons, order summary
- [ ] Tiered discount display: progress bar showing distance to next tier (5% at $500, 10% at $1000)
- [ ] Free shipping progress: 'Add $X more for free shipping' with progress bar
- [ ] Cross-sell in cart: 'Complete the set' product suggestions
- [ ] Checkout: clean form layout, address validation, delivery estimate
- [ ] Payment UI: credit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Afterpay options with icons
- [ ] Success/Thank You page: order confirmation, delivery timeline, social sharing, referral CTA
- [ ] Cart empty state: illustrated + 'Start Shopping' CTA
- [ ] All design tokens: Coral CTAs, Espresso text, Sand backgrounds
- [ ] Mobile: full-width cart, thumb-friendly controls, payment buttons sized for touch
- [ ] WCAG AA: form labels, error messages, keyboard navigation through checkout
- [ ] Tests: add/remove items, quantity changes, discount calculations, empty cart, payment selection, error states","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:35:52Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T02:10:32Z"}

{"id":"cf-fy6h","title":"Homepage hero & visual polish — Blue Ridge aesthetic, trust bar, category showcase","description":"## Homepage Hero & Visual Polish

Implement the full homepage experience per WIX-STUDIO-BUILD-SPEC.md + design.jpeg + FRONTEND-COMPETITIVE-ANALYSIS.md.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Hero section: Full-bleed image/video with Blue Ridge aesthetic, Playfair Display heading, CTA buttons using Coral (#E8845C)
- [ ] Category showcase: 6-card repeater (3-col desktop, 2-col tablet, 1-col mobile) with hover states
- [ ] Trust bar: 'Largest Selection', 'Family Owned Since 1991', '700+ Fabric Swatches', 'Free Shipping Over $999'
- [ ] Sale highlights section with horizontal scroll
- [ ] Testimonial rotating carousel with star ratings
- [ ] Recently viewed section (sessionStorage-backed)
- [ ] All transitions smooth (300ms ease), no janky loads
- [ ] Design tokens applied: Sand #E8D5B7 backgrounds, Espresso #3A2518 text, Mountain Blue #5B8FA8 links
- [ ] Skeleton loading states during data fetch
- [ ] Mobile responsive: hero scales, touch-friendly CTAs, no overflow
- [ ] WCAG AA: all interactive elements keyboard-navigable, contrast ratios pass
- [ ] Tests: loading states, empty states, mobile breakpoints, a11y","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:35:48Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T02:10:36Z"}

{"id":"cf-joph","title":"Illustrated empty states & loading skeletons — mountain-themed, branded experience","description":"## Illustrated Empty States & Loading Skeletons

This is what separates us from every generic furniture site. Mountain-themed branded experience at every loading and empty moment.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Loading skeletons: shimmer effect in Sand #E8D5B7 with mountain silhouette shapes
- [ ] Empty cart: hand-drawn illustration + 'Your cart is as empty as a mountain trail at dawn' + CTA to shop
- [ ] Empty search results: illustrated mountain fog scene + 'We searched every peak...' + suggestions
- [ ] Empty wishlist: illustrated notebook/heart + 'Start your collection' CTA
- [ ] Empty reviews: illustrated pen/paper + 'Be the first to share your experience'
- [ ] Error state: illustrated broken bridge + friendly error message + retry button
- [ ] 404 page: illustrated lost hiker on mountain + search + popular categories
- [ ] Loading spinner: custom mountain/sun animation (not generic spinner)
- [ ] All illustrations use the Blue Ridge palette — no stock clip art
- [ ] Consistent tone: warm, friendly, never clinical
- [ ] Mobile: illustrations scale properly, text remains readable
- [ ] Tests: each empty state renders correctly, error states show retry, loading transitions","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:35:51Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T02:10:40Z"}

{"id":"cf-kadj","title":"Live chat widget — Tidio or Wix Chat integration with proactive triggers and accessibility","description":"## Live Chat Widget Integration

**Why:** Questions kill momentum at checkout. Live chat is a medium-impact funnel gap per STRATEGY.md. Proactive triggers can catch abandoning users.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Integrate Tidio or Wix Chat widget (evaluate both, recommend one)
- [ ] Chat bubble visible on all pages, non-intrusive positioning (bottom-right)
- [ ] Proactive triggers: auto-open after 30s on Product Page, after 10s on Checkout if idle
- [ ] Pre-chat form: name, email, question category (Sales/Support/Returns)
- [ ] Business hours indicator: 'We typically reply within X' or 'Live now' badge
- [ ] Mobile responsive: full-screen chat on mobile, dismissible
- [ ] Keyboard accessible: focus trap when open, Escape to close
- [ ] Integration: pass current page URL and product name to agent context
- [ ] Offline mode: email form when no agents available
- [ ] Analytics: track chat opens, messages sent, conversion correlation
- [ ] Tests: widget load, trigger timing, offline fallback, mobile layout, keyboard nav
- [ ] No performance impact: lazy-load widget after page interactive","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:26Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T02:10:44Z"}

{"id":"cf-mjc3","title":"Product Page UX — gallery polish, swatch visualizer, sticky add-to-cart, comfort cards, reviews section","description":"## Product Page UX Polish

Make the Product Page the best page on the site. Per WIX-STUDIO-BUILD-SPEC.md (27+ specs).

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Product gallery: zoomable main image, thumbnail strip, lightbox on click, swipe on mobile
- [ ] Swatch visualizer: color family filter, visual grid, request modal, fabric lightbox
- [ ] Sticky add-to-cart bar: appears on scroll past main CTA, shows price + button
- [ ] Comfort story cards: illustrated descriptions (plush/firm/etc.) instead of dry specs
- [ ] Cross-sell repeater: 'You Might Also Like' with horizontal scroll
- [ ] Product info accordion: Description, Dimensions, Care, Shipping — smooth expand/collapse
- [ ] Stock urgency: 'Only X left' badge, popularity indicator
- [ ] Delivery estimate with white-glove note
- [ ] Social share buttons: Facebook, Pinterest, email, copy link
- [ ] Wishlist/save button with animation
- [ ] Financing options display: Pay-in-4, 12-month plan with APR
- [ ] All design tokens applied, Mountain Blue accents, Coral CTAs
- [ ] Mobile: touch gallery swipe, collapsible sections, no horizontal overflow
- [ ] WCAG AA: aria labels on all interactive elements
- [ ] Tests: gallery interaction, accordion, empty product, error states, mobile","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:35:49Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T02:10:47Z"}

{"id":"cf-r9sc","title":"Swatch & comfort experience — fabric visualizer, swatch request flow, comfort story cards","description":"## Swatch & Comfort Experience

Solves the #1 online furniture objection: 'I can't touch it.' This is our highest-trust conversion driver per competitive analysis. Albany Park and Joybird prove free swatches lift conversion significantly.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Fabric swatch grid: color-family filtering (Neutrals, Blues, Greens, Reds, Patterns), thumbnail grid with fabric name
- [ ] Swatch detail modal: large fabric image, material composition, care instructions, texture description
- [ ] Swatch request flow: select up to 6 swatches, enter shipping address, confirmation with estimated arrival
- [ ] Swatch request CTA prominently on product page: 'Can't decide? Get free swatches' with Mountain Blue styling
- [ ] Comfort story cards: illustrated descriptions — hand-drawn figure for Plush (sinking into cushion), Firm (sitting upright), Medium (balanced). Replace clinical 1-5 scales with personality.
- [ ] Comfort filtering on category pages: filter by comfort level with illustrated icons
- [ ] Product page 'Feel & Comfort' section: comfort card + fabric detail + swatch request CTA grouped together
- [ ] Swatch confirmation email: branded template with mountain illustration, 'Your swatches are on the way'
- [ ] Mobile: swatch grid scrollable, request flow works on small screens
- [ ] WCAG AA: all swatch selectors labeled, comfort cards have alt text
- [ ] Tests: swatch selection/deselection, max 6 limit, request form validation, comfort card rendering, filter integration","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:37:59Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T02:10:53Z"}

{"id":"cf-r9sc","title":"Swatch & comfort experience — fabric visualizer, swatch request flow, comfort story cards","description":"## Swatch & Comfort Experience

Solves the #1 online furniture objection: 'I can't touch it.' This is our highest-trust conversion driver per competitive analysis. Albany Park and Joybird prove free swatches lift conversion significantly.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Fabric swatch grid: color-family filtering (Neutrals, Blues, Greens, Reds, Patterns), thumbnail grid with fabric name
- [ ] Swatch detail modal: large fabric image, material composition, care instructions, texture description
- [ ] Swatch request flow: select up to 6 swatches, enter shipping address, confirmation with estimated arrival
- [ ] Swatch request CTA prominently on product page: 'Can't decide? Get free swatches' with Mountain Blue styling
- [ ] Comfort story cards: illustrated descriptions — hand-drawn figure for Plush (sinking into cushion), Firm (sitting upright), Medium (balanced). Replace clinical 1-5 scales with personality.
- [ ] Comfort filtering on category pages: filter by comfort level with illustrated icons
- [ ] Product page 'Feel & Comfort' section: comfort card + fabric detail + swatch request CTA grouped together
- [ ] Swatch confirmation email: branded template with mountain illustration, 'Your swatches are on the way'
- [ ] Mobile: swatch grid scrollable, request flow works on small screens
- [ ] WCAG AA: all swatch selectors labeled, comfort cards have alt text
- [ ] Tests: swatch selection/deselection, max 6 limit, request form validation, comfort card rendering, filter integration","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:37:59Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T02:13:01Z"}

{"id":"cf-c66a","title":"Product size and dimension guide with room fit visualization — interactive calculator and overlays","description":"## Product Size & Dimension Guide with Room Fit Visualization

**Why:** Persona C (Small Space Dweller) is dimension-obsessed. 'Will it fit through my door?' is a top objection. Interactive dimension tools reduce returns and increase confidence.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Dimension overlay on product gallery images (length x width x height callouts)
- [ ] 'Will It Fit?' calculator: user inputs room dimensions, shows product-to-room scale
- [ ] Doorway clearance check: product dimensions vs standard door sizes (30/32/36 inch)
- [ ] Assembly dimensions vs box dimensions (shipped folded vs assembled)
- [ ] Visual comparison: product shown next to common reference objects (6ft person, standard couch)
- [ ] Responsive: works on mobile with touch interactions
- [ ] Data source: pull dimensions from product CMS fields
- [ ] Fallback: if dimensions missing, show 'Dimensions coming soon' with contact CTA
- [ ] Error handling: invalid user inputs (negative numbers, non-numeric), missing product data
- [ ] Tests: calculator math, boundary values, missing data, mobile interactions
- [ ] Accessibility: screen reader announces dimension values, keyboard operable","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:18Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T02:13:24Z"}

{"id":"cf-dvlj","title":"Customer reviews and ratings system — product reviews with photo upload, star ratings, verified purchase badges","description":"## Customer Reviews & Ratings System

**Why:** Social proof is the #1 conversion funnel gap (per STRATEGY.md). No product reviews = no trust signals at decision point.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Star rating display on Product Page (1-5 stars, half-star increments)
- [ ] Review submission form with text, star rating, and photo upload (max 3 photos)
- [ ] Verified purchase badge on reviews from customers with matching order history
- [ ] Review moderation queue (backend) — new reviews are pending until approved
- [ ] Average rating + review count shown on category page product cards
- [ ] Sort reviews by: newest, highest rated, lowest rated, most helpful
- [ ] 'Was this helpful?' voting on each review
- [ ] Empty state: 'Be the first to review this product' CTA
- [ ] Error handling: upload failures, network drops, invalid input
- [ ] Mobile responsive, keyboard accessible
- [ ] Sanitize all user input (text + image metadata)
- [ ] Tests: happy path, error states, empty states, XSS vectors, image upload failures","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:03Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T02:13:28Z"}

{"id":"cf-g23j","title":"Recently viewed products with personalized recommendations — sessionStorage carousel and cross-sell","description":"## Recently Viewed + Personalized Recommendations

**Why:** 'Recently viewed' persistence is a known funnel gap — resets on page reload. Cross-sell engine exists but needs a 'Customers Also Bought' companion.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] sessionStorage-based 'Recently Viewed' tracking (persist across page navigations within session)
- [ ] 'You Recently Viewed' carousel on Product Page (below main content) and Home page
- [ ] Max 12 items, FIFO eviction, no duplicates
- [ ] 'Customers Also Bought' section using existing productRecommendations backend
- [ ] Carousel: responsive, swipeable on mobile, keyboard navigable
- [ ] Quick-view or quick-add-to-cart from carousel items
- [ ] Empty state handling: new visitor with no history
- [ ] Error handling: corrupted sessionStorage, recommendation API failures
- [ ] Privacy: no PII in sessionStorage, clear on logout
- [ ] Tests: storage persistence, eviction logic, API failures, empty states, mobile swipe
- [ ] Accessibility: aria-labels on carousel, focus management","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:10Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T02:13:31Z"}

{"id":"cf-0sej","title":"Navigation, global layout & footer — responsive nav, mobile hamburger, breadcrumbs, footer links","description":"## Navigation, Global Layout & Footer

- [ ] Breadcrumbs: schema-compliant, styled with Espresso text, clickable hierarchy
- [ ] Footer: 4-column layout (Shop, About, Support, Connect), newsletter signup, social icons, payment badges

- [ ] Back-to-top button: appears on scroll, smooth scroll, mountain arrow icon
- [ ] Active page indicator in nav

{"id":"cf-5qpo","title":"Conversion optimization — exit-intent, urgency signals, social proof, email capture","description":"## Conversion Optimization Layer

- [ ] Free shipping progress bar: persistent in header/cart showing distance to $999 threshold

- [ ] 'Back in Stock' notification signup for out-of-stock items
- [ ] Newsletter signup: footer + dedicated modal, Mountain-themed design, 10% welcome offer
- [ ] Recently viewed bar: bottom of page, persists across navigation
- [ ] Trust badges at checkout: SSL, money-back guarantee, secure payment icons
- [ ] Mobile: exit-intent adapted for back-button, popups sized for touch, no layout shift
- [ ] Tests: popup trigger/dismiss, email validation, urgency badge thresholds, shipping progress calculation, mobile interactions","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:37:49Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T02:14:14Z"}

{"id":"cf-6arz","title":"Cart & checkout flow polish — side cart UX, checkout page, payment UI, success states","description":"## Cart & Checkout Flow Polish

Seamless purchase experience from add-to-cart through confirmation.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Side cart: slides in from right on add-to-cart, shows items with images, quantity spinners, subtotal
- [ ] Cart page: full layout with product images, quantity controls, remove buttons, order summary
- [ ] Tiered discount display: progress bar showing distance to next tier (5% at $500, 10% at $1000)
- [ ] Free shipping progress: 'Add $X more for free shipping' with progress bar
- [ ] Cross-sell in cart: 'Complete the set' product suggestions
- [ ] Checkout: clean form layout, address validation, delivery estimate
- [ ] Payment UI: credit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Afterpay options with icons
- [ ] Success/Thank You page: order confirmation, delivery timeline, social sharing, referral CTA
- [ ] Cart empty state: illustrated + 'Start Shopping' CTA
- [ ] All design tokens: Coral CTAs, Espresso text, Sand backgrounds
- [ ] Mobile: full-width cart, thumb-friendly controls, payment buttons sized for touch
- [ ] WCAG AA: form labels, error messages, keyboard navigation through checkout
- [ ] Tests: add/remove items, quantity changes, discount calculations, empty cart, payment selection, error states","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:35:52Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T02:17:30Z"}

{"id":"cf-r9sc","title":"Swatch & comfort experience — fabric visualizer, swatch request flow, comfort story cards","description":"## Swatch & Comfort Experience

Solves the #1 online furniture objection: 'I can't touch it.' This is our highest-trust conversion driver per competitive analysis. Albany Park and Joybird prove free swatches lift conversion significantly.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Fabric swatch grid: color-family filtering (Neutrals, Blues, Greens, Reds, Patterns), thumbnail grid with fabric name
- [ ] Swatch detail modal: large fabric image, material composition, care instructions, texture description
- [ ] Swatch request flow: select up to 6 swatches, enter shipping address, confirmation with estimated arrival
- [ ] Swatch request CTA prominently on product page: 'Can't decide? Get free swatches' with Mountain Blue styling
- [ ] Comfort story cards: illustrated descriptions — hand-drawn figure for Plush (sinking into cushion), Firm (sitting upright), Medium (balanced). Replace clinical 1-5 scales with personality.
- [ ] Comfort filtering on category pages: filter by comfort level with illustrated icons
- [ ] Product page 'Feel & Comfort' section: comfort card + fabric detail + swatch request CTA grouped together
- [ ] Swatch confirmation email: branded template with mountain illustration, 'Your swatches are on the way'
- [ ] Mobile: swatch grid scrollable, request flow works on small screens
- [ ] WCAG AA: all swatch selectors labeled, comfort cards have alt text
- [ ] Tests: swatch selection/deselection, max 6 limit, request form validation, comfort card rendering, filter integration","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:37:59Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T02:17:47Z"}

{"id":"cf-4com","title":"Category page filtering UX — faceted nav, compare tool, quick view, sort controls","description":"## Category Page Filtering UX

Implement polished faceted navigation and product browsing.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Faceted filter sidebar: price range slider, color family checkboxes, material, size, comfort level
- [ ] Active filter chips with X to remove, 'Clear All' button
- [ ] Sort controls: Price low/high, Newest, Best Selling, Rating
- [ ] Product grid: 3-col desktop, 2-col tablet, 1-col mobile with smooth transitions
- [ ] Quick view modal: product preview without leaving page (image, price, size select, add-to-cart)
- [ ] Compare tool: checkbox on cards, floating compare bar, side-by-side comparison page
- [ ] Product cards: image, name, price (with compare price strikethrough), rating stars, 'New'/'Sale' badges
- [ ] Skeleton loading during filter changes
- [ ] Empty state when no products match filters — illustrated mountain scene
- [ ] URL params for filter state (shareable filtered views)
- [ ] Mobile: filter sheet slides up from bottom, sticky sort bar
- [ ] WCAG AA: filter controls labeled, results announced to screen readers
- [ ] Tests: filter interactions, empty results, mobile sheet, compare flow","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:35:50Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T02:10:55Z"}

{"id":"cf-kadj","title":"Live chat widget — Tidio or Wix Chat integration with proactive triggers and accessibility","description":"## Live Chat Widget Integration

**Why:** Questions kill momentum at checkout. Live chat is a medium-impact funnel gap per STRATEGY.md. Proactive triggers can catch abandoning users.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Integrate Tidio or Wix Chat widget (evaluate both, recommend one)
- [ ] Chat bubble visible on all pages, non-intrusive positioning (bottom-right)
- [ ] Proactive triggers: auto-open after 30s on Product Page, after 10s on Checkout if idle
- [ ] Pre-chat form: name, email, question category (Sales/Support/Returns)
- [ ] Business hours indicator: 'We typically reply within X' or 'Live now' badge
- [ ] Mobile responsive: full-screen chat on mobile, dismissible
- [ ] Keyboard accessible: focus trap when open, Escape to close
- [ ] Integration: pass current page URL and product name to agent context
- [ ] Offline mode: email form when no agents available
- [ ] Analytics: track chat opens, messages sent, conversion correlation
- [ ] Tests: widget load, trigger timing, offline fallback, mobile layout, keyboard nav
- [ ] No performance impact: lazy-load widget after page interactive","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:26Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T02:17:40Z"}

{"id":"cf-g23j","title":"Recently viewed products with personalized recommendations — sessionStorage carousel and cross-sell","description":"## Recently Viewed + Personalized Recommendations

**Why:** 'Recently viewed' persistence is a known funnel gap — resets on page reload. Cross-sell engine exists but needs a 'Customers Also Bought' companion.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] sessionStorage-based 'Recently Viewed' tracking (persist across page navigations within session)
- [ ] 'You Recently Viewed' carousel on Product Page (below main content) and Home page
- [ ] Max 12 items, FIFO eviction, no duplicates
- [ ] 'Customers Also Bought' section using existing productRecommendations backend
- [ ] Carousel: responsive, swipeable on mobile, keyboard navigable
- [ ] Quick-view or quick-add-to-cart from carousel items
- [ ] Empty state handling: new visitor with no history
- [ ] Error handling: corrupted sessionStorage, recommendation API failures
- [ ] Privacy: no PII in sessionStorage, clear on logout
- [ ] Tests: storage persistence, eviction logic, API failures, empty states, mobile swipe
- [ ] Accessibility: aria-labels on carousel, focus management","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:10Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T02:18:13Z"}

{"id":"cf-c66a","title":"Product size and dimension guide with room fit visualization — interactive calculator and overlays","description":"## Product Size & Dimension Guide with Room Fit Visualization

**Why:** Persona C (Small Space Dweller) is dimension-obsessed. 'Will it fit through my door?' is a top objection. Interactive dimension tools reduce returns and increase confidence.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Dimension overlay on product gallery images (length x width x height callouts)
- [ ] 'Will It Fit?' calculator: user inputs room dimensions, shows product-to-room scale
- [ ] Doorway clearance check: product dimensions vs standard door sizes (30/32/36 inch)
- [ ] Assembly dimensions vs box dimensions (shipped folded vs assembled)
- [ ] Visual comparison: product shown next to common reference objects (6ft person, standard couch)
- [ ] Responsive: works on mobile with touch interactions
- [ ] Data source: pull dimensions from product CMS fields
- [ ] Fallback: if dimensions missing, show 'Dimensions coming soon' with contact CTA
- [ ] Error handling: invalid user inputs (negative numbers, non-numeric), missing product data
- [ ] Tests: calculator math, boundary values, missing data, mobile interactions
- [ ] Accessibility: screen reader announces dimension values, keyboard operable","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:18Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-02-28T02:18:07Z"}

## Live Chat Widget Integration

**Why:** Questions kill momentum at checkout. Live chat is a medium-impact funnel gap per STRATEGY.md. Proactive triggers can catch abandoning users.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Integrate Tidio or Wix Chat widget (evaluate both, recommend one)
- [ ] Chat bubble visible on all pages, non-intrusive positioning (bottom-right)
- [ ] Proactive triggers: auto-open after 30s on Product Page, after 10s on Checkout if idle
- [ ] Pre-chat form: name, email, question category (Sales/Support/Returns)
- [ ] Business hours indicator: 'We typically reply within X' or 'Live now' badge
- [ ] Mobile responsive: full-screen chat on mobile, dismissible
- [ ] Keyboard accessible: focus trap when open, Escape to close
- [ ] Integration: pass current page URL and product name to agent context
- [ ] Offline mode: email form when no agents available
- [ ] Analytics: track chat opens, messages sent, conversion correlation
- [ ] Tests: widget load, trigger timing, offline fallback, mobile layout, keyboard nav
- [ ] No performance impact: lazy-load widget after page interactive","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"cfutons/polecats/chrome","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:26Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-03-02T02:27:13Z"}

## Product Size & Dimension Guide with Room Fit Visualization

**Why:** Persona C (Small Space Dweller) is dimension-obsessed. 'Will it fit through my door?' is a top objection. Interactive dimension tools reduce returns and increase confidence.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Dimension overlay on product gallery images (length x width x height callouts)
- [ ] 'Will It Fit?' calculator: user inputs room dimensions, shows product-to-room scale
- [ ] Doorway clearance check: product dimensions vs standard door sizes (30/32/36 inch)
- [ ] Assembly dimensions vs box dimensions (shipped folded vs assembled)
- [ ] Visual comparison: product shown next to common reference objects (6ft person, standard couch)
- [ ] Responsive: works on mobile with touch interactions
- [ ] Data source: pull dimensions from product CMS fields
- [ ] Fallback: if dimensions missing, show 'Dimensions coming soon' with contact CTA
- [ ] Error handling: invalid user inputs (negative numbers, non-numeric), missing product data
- [ ] Tests: calculator math, boundary values, missing data, mobile interactions
- [ ] Accessibility: screen reader announces dimension values, keyboard operable","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"cfutons/polecats/nitro","owner":"cdeal@mines.edu","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:57:18Z","created_by":"cfutons/crew/melania","updated_at":"2026-03-02T02:27:32Z"}
